evals.prompt: Add a new property to linear elements that snaps midpoints to the grid when dragging, using existing grid/snap helpers. Touch @excalidraw/element only where needed and keep collaboration versioning correct.
evals.expected_output: Identifies mutateElement/Scene path, elementsMap usage, typeChecks if needed, and tests; avoids ad-hoc field assignment without version bumps.

evals.prompt: Implement a pure function that returns the closest point on an ellipse outline to a given GlobalPoint for hit-testing refinement. Where should it live and how should callers use branded types?
evals.expected_output: Places core geometry in @excalidraw/math, documents GlobalPoint usage, suggests integration via bounds/collision in @excalidraw/element if needed.

evals.prompt: A bug: after programmatically setting element.width and element.height in an action, selection handles are wrong until refresh. Fix it properly in the monorepo.
evals.expected_output: Recommends Scene.mutateElement or mutateElement + triggerUpdate, ShapeCache invalidation awareness, not only direct property assignment.
